roa.docketEntryComment: DA OPPO TO MOT TO QUASH FILED
DEFT'S MOTION QUASH WARRANT & PC1538,5 MOT SUPPRESS EVID FILED

/CAL: IN DEPARTMENT 302 BEFORE JUDGE ERNEST H, GOLDSMISTH FOR DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:HAVING PREVIOUSLY TAKEN THE MATTERUNDER SUBMISSION,THE COURT NOW RULES AS FOLLOWS,/X:MOTION TO VACATE AND SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO 1538,5 IS GRANTED,/X:COURT FINDS NO JUSTIFICATION FOR EXTENT OF SEARCH RETENTION SEIZURE OF ALL NARCOTIC RELATED ITEMS NOT SUBJECT OF THE DECLARATION,/ /X:THE COURT SUPPRESSES THE EVIDENCE AT SUBJECT IN DEFENDANT'S MOTION,/X: ANY BAIL POSTED IN THIS CASE IS ORDERED EXONERATED,/MO PC 1385:FOR INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE/

/CAL: IN DEPARTMENT 302 BEFORE THE HONORABLE JUDGE ERNEST H, GOLDSMITH/X:THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR THE COURT'S RULING ON THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TOQUASH,/X:THE ASSISTANT DEPUTY ATTORNEY AND THE DEPUTY PUBLIC DEFENDER INTHIS CASE HAVE BEEN NOTIFIED OF THE CHANGE VIA TELEPHONE,/  /X:THE DPD HASBEEN INSTRUCTED TO INFORM THE DEFENDANT OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE,/CON

/CAL: IN DEPARTMENT 302 BEFORE THE HONORABLE JUDGE ERNEST H, GOLDSMITH/X:THE COURT DENIES THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE RE TIME TO RESPONDTO THE PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION,/X: COUNSEL PRESENTS ARGUMENTS TO THE COURT,/X: AFTER ORAL ARGUMENTS, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION,/CONT/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE IS VACATED/CTORD:SPR REQUIREMENTS ARE CHANGED TO TWICE A WEEK BY PHONE, ONLY/CONTD: TO SETPRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:MATTER HASBEEN PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED   /
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUNACE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:DEF MOT TO QUASH WARRANT BEFORE JUDGE GOLDSMITH/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:03-09-15/987,2/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/OR/DOP/
